<Task/>
<Group hide-input="false" labelreference="L7" drawlabel="true" applyint="true" applyrational="true" applyexponent="false"><Text-field prompt="&gt; " style="Maple Input" layout="Normal"><Font encoding="UTF-8">restart;

# \320\223\320\265\320\275\320\265\321\200\320\260\321\206\320\270\321\217 \320\272\320\273\321\216\321\207\320\265\320\271 RSA
generateRSAKeys := proc()
    local p, q, n, phi, e, d;
    p := nextprime(rand(1000..10000)());
    q := nextprime(rand(1000..10000)());
    n := p * q;
    phi := (p-1) * (q-1);
    e := 65537;  # \320\241\321\202\320\260\320\275\320\264\320\260\321\200\321\202\320\275\320\276\320\265 \320\267\320\275\320\260\321\207\320\265\320\275\320\270\320\265 \320\276\321\202\320\272\321\200\321\213\321\202\320\276\320\271 \321\215\320\272\321\201\320\277\320\276\320\275\320\265\320\275\321\202\321\213
    d := modp(1/e, phi);
    return [n, e], [n, d];
end proc:

# \320\237\320\276\320\264\320\277\320\270\321\201\321\214 \321\201\320\276\320\276\320\261\321\211\320\265\320\275\320\270\321\217
signRSA := proc(message, privateKey)
    local n, d;
    n := privateKey[1];
    d := privateKey[2];
    return (message &amp;^ d) mod n;
end proc:

# \320\237\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\265\321\200\320\272\320\260 \320\277\320\276\320\264\320\277\320\270\321\201\320\270
verifyRSA := proc(sig, publicKey)
    local n, e;
    n := publicKey[1];
    e := publicKey[2];
    return (sig &amp;^ e) mod n;
end proc:

# \320\237\321\200\320\270\320\274\320\265\321\200 \320\270\321\201\320\277\320\276\320\273\321\214\320\267\320\276\320\262\320\260\320\275\320\270\321\217
publicKey, privateKey := generateRSAKeys();
message := 1234;
sig := signRSA(message, privateKey);
verifiedMessage := verifyRSA(sig, publicKey);

printf(&quot;\320\230\321\201\321\205\320\276\320\264\320\275\320\276\320\265 \321\201\320\276\320\276\320\261\321\211\320\265\320\275\320\270\320\265: %d\134n&quot;, message);
printf(&quot;\320\237\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\265\321\200\320\265\320\275\320\275\320\276\320\265 \321\201\320\276\320\276\320\261\321\211\320\265\320\275\320\270\320\265: %d\134n&quot;, verifiedMessage);

# \320\245\321\215\321\210-\321\204\321\203\320\275\320\272\321\206\320\270\321\217 (\321\203\320\277\321\200\320\276\321\211\320\265\320\275\320\275\320\260\321\217 \321\200\320\265\320\260\320\273\320\270\320\267\320\260\321\206\320\270\321\217)
hash := proc(message)
    local h;
    h := 0;
    for i from 1 to length(message) do
        h := (h * 256 + ord(substring(message, i))) mod 1000000007;
    end do;
    return h;
end proc:

# \320\237\320\276\320\264\320\277\320\270\321\201\321\214 \321\201 \321\205\321\215\321\210\320\270\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\260\320\275\320\270\320\265\320\274
signRSAWithHash := proc(message, privateKey)
    local hashedMessage;
    hashedMessage := hash(message);
    return signRSA(hashedMessage, privateKey);
end proc:

# \320\237\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\265\321\200\320\272\320\260 \321\201 \321\205\321\215\321\210\320\270\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\260\320\275\320\270\320\265\320\274
verifyRSAWithHash := proc(signature, publicKey, originalMessage)
    local hashedOriginal;
    hashedOriginal := hash(originalMessage);
    return verifyRSA(signature, publicKey) = hashedOriginal;
end proc:

# \320\237\321\200\320\270\320\274\320\265\321\200
message := &quot;Hello, Maple!&quot;;
signature := signRSAWithHash(message, privateKey);
isValid := verifyRSAWithHash(signature, publicKey, message);

printf(&quot;\320\241\320\276\320\276\320\261\321\211\320\265\320\275\320\270\320\265: %s\134n&quot;, message);
printf(&quot;\320\237\320\276\320\264\320\277\320\270\321\201\321\214 \320\262\320\265\321\200\320\275\320\260: %a\134n&quot;, isValid);


# \320\250\320\270\321\204\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\260\320\275\320\270\320\265 \321\201\320\276\320\276\320\261\321\211\320\265\320\275\320\270\321\217 \320\276\321\202\320\272\321\200\321\213\321\202\321\213\320\274 \320\272\320\273\321\216\321\207\320\276\320\274 \320\277\320\276\320\273\321\203\321\207\320\260\321\202\320\265\320\273\321\217
encryptRSA := proc(message, publicKey)
    local n, e;
    n := publicKey[1];
    e := publicKey[2];
    return message &amp;^ e mod n;
end proc:

# \320\237\320\276\320\264\320\277\320\270\321\201\321\214 \320\270 \321\210\320\270\321\204\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\260\320\275\320\270\320\265
signAndEncrypt := proc(message, senderPrivateKey, receiverPublicKey)
    local signature, encryptedMessage;
    signature := signRSA(message, senderPrivateKey);
    encryptedMessage := encryptRSA(message, receiverPublicKey);
    return [encryptedMessage, signature];
end proc:

# \320\240\320\260\321\201\321\210\320\270\321\204\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\272\320\260 \320\270 \320\277\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\265\321\200\320\272\320\260
decryptAndVerify := proc(data, receiverPrivateKey, senderPublicKey)
    local decryptedMessage, signature;
    decryptedMessage := signRSA(data[1], receiverPrivateKey);  # \320\240\320\260\321\201\321\210\320\270\321\204\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\272\320\260
    signature := data[2];
    return verifyRSA(signature, senderPublicKey) = decryptedMessage;
end proc:

# \320\237\321\200\320\270\320\274\320\265\321\200
receiverPublicKey, receiverPrivateKey := generateRSAKeys();
encryptedData := signAndEncrypt(1234, privateKey, receiverPublicKey);
isValid := decryptAndVerify(encryptedData, receiverPrivateKey, publicKey);

printf(&quot;\320\237\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\265\321\200\320\272\320\260 \320\277\320\276\320\264\320\277\320\270\321\201\320\270 \320\270 \321\200\320\260\321\201\321\210\320\270\321\204\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\272\320\270: %a\134n&quot;, isValid);

# \320\220\321\203\321\202\320\265\320\275\321\202\320\270\321\204\320\270\320\272\320\260\321\206\320\270\321\217 \321\201 \320\270\321\201\320\277\320\276\320\273\321\214\320\267\320\276\320\262\320\260\320\275\320\270\320\265\320\274 \321\201\320\273\321\203\321\207\320\260\320\271\320\275\320\276\320\263\320\276 \320\262\321\213\320\267\320\276\320\262\320\260
authenticate := proc(privateKey, publicKey)
    local challenge, response;
    challenge := rand(1000..10000)();
    printf(&quot;\320\241\320\265\321\200\320\262\320\265\321\200 \320\276\321\202\320\277\321\200\320\260\320\262\320\273\321\217\320\265\321\202 \320\262\321\213\320\267\320\276\320\262: %d\134n&quot;, challenge);
    response := signRSA(challenge, privateKey);
    return verifyRSA(response, publicKey) = challenge;
end proc:

# \320\237\321\200\320\270\320\274\320\265\321\200
isAuthenticated := authenticate(privateKey, publicKey);
printf(&quot;\320\220\321\203\321\202\320\265\320\275\321\202\320\270\321\204\320\270\320\272\320\260\321\206\320\270\321\217 \321\203\321\201\320\277\320\265\321\210\320\275\320\260: %a\134n&quot;, isAuthenticated);

# \320\241\320\273\320\265\320\277\320\260\321\217 \320\277\320\276\320\264\320\277\320\270\321\201\321\214
blindSign := proc(message, signerPublicKey, signerPrivateKey)
    local blindingFactor, blindedMessage, blindSignature, unblindedSignature;
    blindingFactor := rand(2..signerPublicKey[1]-1)();
    blindedMessage := (message * blindingFactor &amp;^ signerPublicKey[2]) mod signerPublicKey[1];
    blindSignature := signRSA(blindedMessage, signerPrivateKey);
    unblindedSignature := (blindSignature * modp(1/blindingFactor, signerPublicKey[1])) mod signerPublicKey[1];
    return unblindedSignature;
end proc:

# \320\237\321\200\320\270\320\274\320\265\321\200
message := 1234;
blindSignature := blindSign(message, publicKey, privateKey);
isValid := verifyRSA(blindSignature, publicKey) = message;

printf(&quot;\320\241\320\273\320\265\320\277\320\260\321\217 \320\277\320\276\320\264\320\277\320\270\321\201\321\214 \320\262\320\265\321\200\320\275\320\260: %a\134n&quot;, isValid);</Font></Text-field>

\320\237\321\200\320\276\320\262\320\265\321\200\320\265\320\275\320\275\320\276\320\265 \321\201\320\276\320\276\320\261\321\211\320\265\320\275\320\270\320\265: 1234
</Font></Text-field>
